label: June 6, 2026
text: Released [openseespy-solvers](https://pypi.org/project/openseespy-solvers/), a Python package with SciPy-style sparse linear and eigen solvers for OpenSeesPy's `PythonSparse` command ([post](/posts/2026-06-06-openseespy-solvers/index.qmd), [docs](https://openseespy-solvers.readthedocs.io/en/stable/), [source](https://github.com/gaaraujo/openseespy-solvers)).

label: May 31, 2026
text: Website launched — research notes, OpenSeesPy examples, and project updates will be posted in [Posts](/posts/index.qmd).

label: May 28, 2026
text: Lightning talk at the [2026 NHERI Computational Symposium](https://simcenter.designsafe-ci.org/nheri-computational-symposium/2026/) — *Enabling Higher-Resolution Nonlinear Structural Analysis Through GPU-Accelerated Solvers* ([session abstract](https://simcenter.designsafe-ci.org/nheri-computational-symposium/2026/agenda/session-abstracts/presenters-session-4a/), [talk page](/talks/nheri-computational-symposium-2026/index.qmd)).

photos.alt: Gustavo A. Araújo R. presenting on GPU-accelerated solvers in OpenSees at the 2026 NHERI Computational Symposium, UC Berkeley

photo_caption: 2026 NHERI Computational Symposium, Hearst Memorial Mining Building, UC Berkeley — *Innovation Through Collaboration* (OpenSees and GPU-accelerated Python solvers). See the [talk page](/talks/nheri-computational-symposium-2026/index.qmd).

label: September 2025 – June 2026
text: Shah Fellowship on Catastrophic Risk, Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering, Stanford University.

label: September 2025
text: Participated in the [EERI Learning From Earthquakes Travel Study](https://www.eeri.org/about-eeri/news/27694-lfe-travel-study-explores-mexico-s-40-year-journey-toward-earthquake-resilience) in Mexico City.

photos.alt: 2025 EERI Learning From Earthquakes travel study participants at the United Nations office in Mexico City
2025 EERI Learning From Earthquakes travel study group at Torre Reforma, Mexico City

photo_caption: 2025 EERI LFE Travel Study, Mexico City (photos courtesy of [EERI](https://www.eeri.org/)).

label: July 2025
text: Journal article on experimental and numerical simulation of a three-story mass timber building with pivoting walls published in *Journal of Structural Engineering*, 151(7) ([doi:10.1061/JSENDH.STENG-13781](https://doi.org/10.1061/JSENDH.STENG-13781)).

photos.alt: Three-story pivoting-wall test specimen showing first-story BRB, MPP screwed connection, and boundary elements

photo_caption: Figure 3, *Journal of Structural Engineering* 151(7) ([doi:10.1061/JSENDH.STENG-13781](https://doi.org/10.1061/JSENDH.STENG-13781); [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/392237132)) — pivoting-wall specimen ([project page](/projects/osu-three-story-pivoting-walls/index.qmd)).

label: May 15, 2025
text: Participated in the [Stanford Engineering Centennial Showcase](https://events.stanford.edu/event/stanford-engineering-centennial-celebration-and-showcase) with the [Simpson Lab](https://simpsoba.su.domains/) — a scaled shaking-table demo of mass timber rocking walls with BRBs and outreach on [NHERI Converging Design](https://tallwoodinstitute.org/nheri-converging-design/) testing ([lab recap](https://simpsoba.su.domains/lab-update/showcasing-innovation-in-resilient-structural-design-at-the-stanford-engineering-centennial/)).

photos.alt: Gustavo A. Araújo R. presenting a scaled mass timber rocking-wall model at the Stanford Engineering Centennial Showcase
Simpson Lab team with the shake-table model built for the Centennial Showcase demo

photo_caption: Stanford Engineering Centennial Showcase, May 15, 2025 (photos courtesy of Simpson Lab).

label: April 2025
text: [2025 EERI Seismic Design Competition](https://www.eeri.org/), Berkeley, CA — Co-President, [EERI Student Leadership Council](https://slc.eeri.org/2024-2025-slc-officers/).

photos.alt: 2025 EERI Seismic Design Competition participants and team members at Berkeley, California

photo_caption: 2025 EERI Seismic Design Competition, Berkeley, CA.

label: February 24, 2025
text: Advanced to PhD candidacy in Civil and Environmental Engineering, Stanford University.

label: January 2025 – March 2025
text: Teaching Assistant for CEE 282 — Nonlinear Structural Analysis, Stanford University (Winter Quarter 2025).

label: January 2023
text: Began PhD in Civil & Environmental Engineering at Stanford University ([Universidad del Norte alumni profile](https://www.uninorte.edu.co/web/blog.egresados/egresados-destacados-entradas/-/blogs/gustavo-araujo-es-admitido-en-la-universidad-de-stanford-para-culminar-sus-estudios-doctorales)).

label: July 1, 2024 – July 5, 2024
text: Attended the [18th World Conference on Earthquake Engineering (18WCEE)](https://www.wcee2024.it/) in Milan, Italy, with the [Simpson Lab](https://simpsoba.su.domains/) — presented *Accelerating Finite-Element Structural Elastic Dynamic Analysis Using GPU Computing* ([lab recap](https://simpsoba.su.domains/lab-update/wcee2024-in-milan-italy/), [publications](/publications.qmd)).

Gustavo A. Araújo R. at the 18th World Conference on Earthquake Engineering in Milan, Italy

label: April 2024
text: [2024 EERI Seismic Design Competition](https://www.eeri.org/), Seattle, WA — Lead Seismic Design Competition Chair, [EERI Student Leadership Council](https://slc.eeri.org/slc-2023-2024-officers/).

photos.alt: 2024 EERI Seismic Design Competition team at the finals in Seattle, Washington

photo_caption: 2024 EERI Seismic Design Competition, Seattle, WA.

label: January 19, 2024
text: On site for Phase II shake-table testing of a six-story mass timber building at UC San Diego as part of [NHERI Converging Design](https://tallwoodinstitute.org/nheri-converging-design/) — post-tensioned rocking walls with BRBs and UFP energy dissipators ([project page](/projects/nheri-converging-design-six-story/index.qmd)).

Investigators on site during the final days of six-story mass timber shake-table testing at UC San Diego

photo_caption: Phase II shake-table testing, UC San Diego, January 2024 (NHERI Converging Design).

text: Completed MS in Wood Science at Oregon State University.

label: June 21, 2023
text: Presented *Cyclic Testing and Numerical Modeling of a Three-Story Mass-Timber Building with a Pivoting Mass Ply Panel Spine and Buckling-Restrained Energy Dissipators* at the [13th World Conference on Timber Engineering (WCTE)](https://www.wcte2023.com/), Oslo, Norway ([publications](/publications.qmd), [project page](/projects/osu-three-story-pivoting-walls/index.qmd)).

text: Completed full-scale cyclic testing of a [three-story mass timber building with pivoting walls](/projects/osu-three-story-pivoting-walls/index.qmd) at Oregon State University.

label: February 2021
text: Defended MS thesis in Civil Engineering at Universidad del Norte (*Cum Laude*).

label: Summer 2017
